summary: Extracted the executeRun command-processing loop into an exported `runExecuteRunCommands(commands, artifactsDir, cwd)` function in `bin/lib/run.mjs`, fixing the critical ordering bug where the failure flag was set after `writeFileSync` (allowing a write error to silently swallow a required-command failure). Replaced four hand-coded simulation tests with real integration tests that import and call `runExecuteRunCommands` directly, so deleting the production logic now causes test failures. All 576 tests pass.
